# Copilot Instructions for FreeCLI

## Project

C application using ncurses (with `menu`, `form`, `panel` extensions). Build system is autotools (autoconf + automake).

## Build commands

```bash
# First-time setup (generates configure script)
autoreconf -fi

# Configure and build
./configure
make

# Clean
make clean
make distclean   # also removes configure artefacts
```

## Architecture

- `src/` — C source files; `src/main.c` is the entry point
- `include/` — project header files
- `m4/` — autoconf macro files
- `configure.ac` — autoconf input; defines required libraries (ncurses, menu, form, panel)
- `src/Makefile.am` and `Makefile.am` — automake inputs (to be created alongside source)

## Key conventions

- Dependencies are ncurses + its sub-libraries (`-lmenu`, `-lform`, `-lpanel`). Always include `<ncurses.h>` before `<menu.h>`, `<form.h>`, `<panel.h>`.
- `config.h` is generated by `./configure` — include it first in every `.c` file that needs feature-test macros (`#include "config.h"`).
- New source files must be added to `src/Makefile.am` (`_SOURCES`); new m4 macros go in `m4/` and are picked up automatically via `AC_CONFIG_MACRO_DIR([m4])`.
